items.content_html: ⛩ Yochimu means prophetic dream in Japanese. The purpose of this tool is to let you read comfortably any kind of text, by reviewing and learning its vocabulary using an in-context approach with sentences using an SRS solutions like Anki. What Yochimu does is, given a file with text in Japanese, it returns a list of words from that text along with their definitions, translations and example sentences, to let you create decks.
items.title: ernestohegi/japanese-text-parser: ⛩ Yochimu means prophetic dream in Japanese. items.content_html: These cards will help you gain a comprehensive understanding of XPath, including its concepts, functions, axis selectors, path expressions, and other important aspects. By studying these cards, you will become more proficient in using XPath to process XML and HTML documents, enabling you to effectively extract and manage data.
items.title: HzaCode/Xpath-Anki-Card: These cards will help you gain a comprehensive understanding of XPath, including its concepts, functions, axis selectors, path expressions, and other important aspects. By studying these cards, you will become more proficient in using XPath to process XML and HTML documents, enabling you to effectively extract and manage data.
